forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h shifting west to southwesterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely later this evening. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely at night. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.
Cloudy. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northerly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.
Cloudy. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northerly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending east to southeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending south to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.
Cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northwesterly in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers west of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor in the early morning. Winds northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Ceduna in the afternoon and evening. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely at night. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h shifting west to southwesterly in the late morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely at night. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection 11:50am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers west of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Coober Pedy in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southwesterly during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Woomera, medium chance elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Woomera in the afternoon and evening. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Leigh Creek, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening then becoming light in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Leigh Creek, slight chance elsewhere. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then tending east to northeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Leigh Creek in the afternoon and evening. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
